image:image.image:title: Lakeside Retreat Glamping Domes at Sunset
image:image.image:caption: Luxury glamping domes at Lakeside Retreat overlooking Lake Dunstan vineyards at sunset, Cromwell, Central Otago

image:image.image:title: Lake Dunstan and Central Otago Mountains
image:image.image:caption: Crystal-clear Lake Dunstan with snow-capped Central Otago mountains — the perfect setting for Lakeside Retreat

image:image.image:title: View from the Vineyard at Lakeside Retreat
image:image.image:caption: Panoramic vineyard views at Lakeside Retreat, Cromwell, Central Otago wine country

image:image.image:title: Geodesic Domes Among the Vines
image:image.image:caption: Lakeside Retreat's geodesic glamping domes nestled among Central Otago vineyards on Lake Dunstan

image:image.image:title: Dome Pinot — 50sqm Luxury Geodesic Dome
image:image.image:caption: Flagship 50sqm luxury geodesic dome with panoramic Lake Dunstan views and private outdoor spa, Cromwell

image:image.image:title: Dome Pinot Private Deck — Autumn Vineyard Views
image:image.image:caption: Private deck at Dome Pinot overlooking autumn vineyard and Lake Dunstan

image:image.image:title: Dome Pinot Interior — Luxury Living Space
image:image.image:caption: Luxurious open-plan interior of Dome Pinot with floor-to-ceiling windows and lake views

image:image.image:title: Dome Pinot — Lake and Vineyard Window View
image:image.image:caption: Panoramic view of Lake Dunstan and vineyard through Dome Pinot's floor-to-ceiling windows

image:image.image:title: Dome Rosé — Private Outdoor Spa
image:image.image:caption: Romantic 40sqm geodesic dome with private outdoor spa overlooking Central Otago vineyard at dusk

image:image.image:title: Dome Rosé — Mountain Panorama
image:image.image:caption: Stunning snow-capped mountain views from Dome Rosé luxury glamping dome in Central Otago

image:image.image:title: Dome Rosé — Vineyard Setting
image:image.image:caption: Central Otago vineyard landscape surrounding Dome Rosé at Lakeside Retreat

image:image.image:title: Lakeside Cottage — Exterior with Lake Views
image:image.image:caption: Pet-friendly Lakeside Cottage with direct Lake Dunstan access, sleeps up to 3 guests

image:image.image:title: Lakeside Cottage — Lake Dunstan Views
image:image.image:caption: Stunning Lake Dunstan views from the deck of the family-friendly Lakeside Cottage

image:image.image:title: Lakeside Cottage — Bedroom with Mountain Views
image:image.image:caption: Comfortable bedroom at Lakeside Cottage with mountain views, Cromwell Central Otago

image:image.image:title: Lakeside Cottage — Bathroom with Timber Vanity
image:image.image:caption: Stylish bathroom with timber vanity at the Lakeside Cottage, Cromwell

image:image.image:title: Lakeside Retreat Domes in Winter
image:image.image:caption: Lakeside Retreat glamping domes in winter with snow-capped Central Otago mountains

image:image.image:title: Rainbow Over Lake Dunstan
image:image.image:caption: Spectacular rainbow over Lake Dunstan at Lakeside Retreat, Cromwell, New Zealand

image:image.image:title: Golden Autumn Vineyard — Central Otago
image:image.image:caption: Golden autumn colours in the Central Otago vineyard surrounding Lakeside Retreat

image:image.image:title: Otago Rail Trail — 300m from Lakeside Retreat
image:image.image:caption: The famous Otago Rail Trail cycle path, just 300 metres from Lakeside Retreat accommodation
